# OmniMind

## Docs

- [API Reference](https://techiral.mintlify.app/api-reference/introduction.md): Complete OmniMind API Documentation
- [Development](https://techiral.mintlify.app/development.md): Contributing to OmniMind
- [Configuration](https://techiral.mintlify.app/essentials/configuration.md): Configure your OmniMind environment
- [Connection Types](https://techiral.mintlify.app/essentials/connection-types.md): Understanding the different connection types for MCP servers
- [LLM Integration](https://techiral.mintlify.app/essentials/llm-integration.md): Integrate any LLM with OmniMind through LangChain
- [Introduction](https://techiral.mintlify.app/introduction.md): Welcome to OmniMind - The Open Source MCP Client Library
- [Quickstart](https://techiral.mintlify.app/quickstart.md): Get started with OmniMind in minutes!

## OpenAPI Specs

- [openapi](https://techiral.mintlify.app/api-reference/openapi.json)
